title: Dusted Smoky Venezuelan Cod Ceviche
description: A smoky, flaky ceviche infused with low-FODMAP massaman paste, iced to preserve freshness and served with crisp cucumber and cilantro.
instructions: Pat the cod fillets dry and cut into 1/2 inch cubes.
In a bowl whisk together lime juice, lemon juice, massaman paste, smoked paprika, ground cumin, salt, and pepper until smooth.
Add cod cubes to the bowl and gently toss to coat, then cover and refrigerate for 10 minutes to macerate.
While the fish chills, prepare an ice bath by filling a large bowl with cold water and ice cubes.
After 10 minutes, transfer the seasoned cod into the ice bath, letting it sit for 5 minutes to stop the cooking process.
Drain the cod and return it to the bowl.
Add diced cucumber, finely chopped jalapeño, chopped cilantro, and lime zest; toss gently to combine.
Plate the ceviche, drizzle with a small amount of olive oil if desired, and serve immediately.
